name: goodboy-framework
desc: 15-stage Windows malware development & analysis course in Rust. Red team builds it, blue team detects it. All 15 binaries achieved 0/76 on VirusTotal.
descFull: 15-stage Windows malware development & analysis course in Rust. Red team builds it, blue team detects it. All 15 binaries achieved 0/76 on VirusTotal.
